name: Project Bedrock
summary: Git-tracked markdown memory store for AI coding agents
description: Project Bedrock is a Python CLI that gives AI coding agents persistent, git-tracked markdown 'project memory' via session-start and session-stop hooks. It installs into the project's .claude/, .cursor/, and .codex/ directories.
author: robotaitai

commands.linux: (command -v pipx >/dev/null 2>&1) || python3 -m pip install --user pipx 2>/dev/null || python3 -m pip install --user --break-system-packages pipx; export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"; pipx ensurepath; pipx install project-bedrock
commands.darwin: (command -v pipx >/dev/null 2>&1) || (command -v brew >/dev/null 2>&1 && brew install pipx) || python3 -m pip install --user --break-system-packages pipx; export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"; pipx ensurepath; pipx install project-bedrock
commands.win32: (where pipx >NUL 2>&1 || python -m pip install --user pipx) && python -m pipx install project-bedrock
